fields.description: Auto extracts text directly from digital PDFs and runs OCR only for scanned or mixed documents.
fields.label: OCR Mode

fields.description: Auto stores a searchable PDF only for scanned PDFs and images.
fields.label: Searchable PDF Generation

fields.description: Minimum non-whitespace characters used to identify a PDF as digital text.
fields.label: Digital PDF Text Threshold

fields.description: Optional fallback only for pages where local OCR produced no text. It does not answer Document Chat questions.
fields.label: Use OpenAI Vision as OCR Fallback

fields.description: Used only when OpenAI Vision OCR fallback is enabled and local OCR leaves a page without text.
fields.label: OpenAI Vision Model

fields.description: Model used to rewrite follow-up questions and generate Document Chat answers. For LM Studio use an identifier returned by /v1/models.
fields.label: RAG Chat Model

fields.description: OpenAI calls the official OpenAI API. OpenAI Compatible calls another remote API endpoint. Ollama uses its native API. LM Studio uses its local OpenAI-compatible server.
fields.label: Chat Provider
fields.options:
OpenAI
OpenAI Compatible
Ollama
LM Studio

fields.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL, Ollama server URL, or LM Studio URL. LM Studio defaults to http://localhost:1234/v1.
fields.label: Chat Endpoint

fields.description: Local runs Sentence Transformers on the worker. OpenAI calls the official OpenAI API. OpenAI Compatible and LM Studio send document chunks and queries to an embeddings API.
fields.label: Embedding Provider
fields.options:
Local (sentence-transformers)
OpenAI
OpenAI Compatible
LM Studio

fields.description: Base URL for the embeddings API. Required for OpenAI Compatible. LM Studio defaults to http://localhost:1234/v1.
fields.label: Embedding Endpoint

fields.description: Use a multilingual Sentence Transformers model for Local, an official OpenAI embedding model for OpenAI, an API model for OpenAI Compatible, or an LM Studio model identifier. Rebuild the RAG index after changing this value.
fields.label: Embedding Model

fields.description: Minimum cosine similarity required for semantic-only evidence. Lexical matches are not affected.
fields.label: Minimum Semantic Score

fields.description: Runs locally after hybrid retrieval. It does not call OpenAI or Ollama.
fields.label: Enable Local Reranker

fields.description: Required when chat, embeddings, or OCR fallback uses official OpenAI services.
fields.label: OpenAI API Key

fields.description: Required when chat or embeddings use an OpenAI Compatible provider with authentication.
fields.label: OpenAI Compatible API Key

fields.description: Allow generic OpenAI-compatible endpoints that resolve to private or local IP addresses. Ollama and LM Studio local endpoints are always allowed.
fields.label: Allow Internal AI Endpoints
Index Path (Relative to site private files)

fields.description: Operational DocTypes indexed in Tantivy for fast full-text lookup. Document records use the separate semantic RAG index. Rebuild Unified Search after changing this list.
fields.label: Operational Indexed DocTypes
